name: pos_backoffice_orchestrator
description: POS Backoffice SDLC orchestrator — 7-stage workflow for PHP, Go, and React projects
welcomeMessage:
👋 POS Backoffice Orchestrator ready!

I drive the full SDLC for PHP, Go, and React projects:
  Analyze → Explore → Plan → 🚦 → Implement → Test → Review → 🚦 → Document

• Give me a Jira ticket: "Implement POS-1234"
• Or a direct task: "Add a new endpoint for X in the Go service"

I'll detect the language and route to the right agents.

agentSpawn.description: Inject available agents registry for dynamic delegation
Generate delegation map for routing decisions
